scripts.build: npm --workspace shared/api-contracts run build && npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace cloudflare run build
scripts.check: npm --workspace shared/api-contracts run check && npm --workspace backend run check && npm --workspace web run check && npm --workspace cloudflare run check
scripts.test: npm --workspace backend run test && npm --workspace web run test && npm --workspace cloudflare run test
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace cloudflare run deploy
